top_signals.title: Ukraine’s top strike-drone maker moves into ballistic missile defense
top_signals.summary: Fire Point's drones already fly most of Kyiv's strikes inside Russia. With Germany's Hensoldt, the company is now building Freyja, a homegrown alternative.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Retail Payments Infrastructure Board launches consultation on the next generation UK payments infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Today marks a major milestone in the modernisation of the UK's payments landscape, with the Retail Payments Infrastructure Board (RPIB) launching a consultation on the future design of the UK's next-generation retail payments infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Remaining anchored: Monetary Policy in an unpredictable world - speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the Reykjavík Economic Conference 2026, Iceland
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Can AI make cutlery? -  speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the 389th Cutlers’ Feast, Cutlers’ Hall, Sheffield
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: HM Treasury: special advisers’ gifts, hospitality and meetings, January to March 2026
top_signals.summary: Data on gifts and hospitality received by special advisers, and meetings they attended with senior media figures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: HM Treasury: ministerial overseas travel and meetings, January to March 2026
top_signals.summary: Data on ministers’ overseas travel and meetings with external individuals and organisations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Integra grows reserve by 74% at Florida Canyon gold mine
top_signals.summary: The update raises annual production about 17% to 82,000 oz. gold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: A sea change in regulatory investigations and enforcement − speech by David Chaplin
top_signals.summary: Given at the 5th Conference on Financial Law and Regulation, University of Leeds School of Law, 24 June 2026

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: DRC is setting the terms of global competition for critical minerals
top_signals.summary: At the centre lies cobalt and the Congolese strategy to move up the value chain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ground view Kazakhstan: Brezhnev’s needles
top_signals.summary: Kazakhstan holds a vast geological archive from the Soviet era that could aid in supplying critical minerals to the West.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Site visit: Blue Lagoon leverages cash into Dome’s 1M oz resource bid
top_signals.summary: The operation opened a year ago and now aims to lift Dome to a steady 150 tonnes per day before drill rigs return to the 215-sq.-km property later this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New analysis on the EU's most threatening criminal networks
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 26 Jun 2026 Today, the European Commission, Europol and the Cypriot Presidency of the Council of the EU are presenting a new Europol analysis of the EU's most threatening criminal networks.

alerts.title: Swiss glaciers facing drastic loss from heat wave
alerts.summary: The snow and ice accumulated last winter by Switzerland's glaciers is expected to have all melted away by Monday.
